blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 40 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
